RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0029 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Ivan Ito Date of Birth: 04/08/1997 SSN (tokenized): TKN-520681 Annual Income: $119,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $33,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN15689AL Toyota 320i 2025 Hybrid Used 52,000 Authorized Signature: Ivan Ito
